title: Pair 05: Low vs High Cleaning Capacity
summary: This comparison keeps the Korean BBQ room, arrivals, and reservation handling fixed, but changes how quickly tables can be reset and returned to service. Option A has a tighter cleaning bottleneck, while Option B clears grills faster so you can see how much smoother the floor feels when reset capacity expands.

A.label: Tight cleaning bottleneck
A.notes: Staff can only turn a small number of grill tables at once, so dirty tables accumulate during the dinner peak.

B.label: Expanded cleaning team
B.notes: A stronger reset team gets grill tables back into service faster without changing the arrival stream.
